failures.message: R2SearchError: DuckDB execution failed: Binder Error: Referenced column "exemptions" not found in FROM clause!

action_plan: The model emitted a WITH/CTE block but no final SELECT. Keep the validator/generation guardrail that rejects incomplete CTEs, then rerun so the model produces SELECT ... FROM the CTE.
Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: The model emitted a WITH/CTE block but no final SELECT. Keep the validator/generation guardrail that rejects incomplete CTEs, then rerun so the model produces SELECT ... FROM the CTE.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH ps AS (
  SELECT
    parcel_number,
    acres,
    exemptions
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
  WHERE acres < 2
), a AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM("Parcel Number") AS parcel_number,
    TRIM(COALESCE("Utilities", '')) AS utilities
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet')
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE("Utilities", '')) = ''
)
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number
FROM ps
JOIN a ON ps.parcel_number = a.parcel_number
WHERE (ps.exemptions IS NULL OR TRIM(ps.exemptions) = '')
cases.title: Parcels Less Than 2 Acres with No Utilities and No Exemptions
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with less than 2 acres, no utilities recorded, and no exemptions. Flood plain exclusion not applied due to lack of flood plain data in schema.

cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
), low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, 'MSL low-quality improvement class' AS match_reasons, string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
)
SELECT swp.parcel_number, swp.acres, lqi.quality_codes, lqi.match_reasons
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels swp
JOIN low_quality_improvements lqi ON swp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (MSL) and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

cases.prompt: Unimproved land inside Mount Vernon city limits.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.city_name, ps.inside_city_limits
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.inside_city_limits = TRUE
    AND LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'mount vernon'
),
unimproved AS (
  SELECT parcel_number, land_use, improvement_building_count
  FROM base
  WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) = 911
    AND COALESCE(improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
)
SELECT parcel_number, land_use, improvement_building_count
FROM unimproved
cases.title: Unimproved Land Inside Mount Vernon City Limits
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels classified as unimproved land (land use code 911) located inside Mount Vernon city limits with no buildings or improvements.

cases.prompt: Unimproved land in or near Marblemount over 5 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip, COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.acres > 5
    AND (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
    AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (910, 911, 912)
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
    AND ps.acres IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT parcel_number, land_use, acres, improvement_building_count
FROM base
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Unimproved Land in or Near Marblemount Over 5 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels of unimproved land (no buildings) with land use codes indicating undeveloped land, located in or near Marblemount, with parcel size over 5 acres.

FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps

  AND COALESCE(ps.total_garage_area, 0) > 0

  AND (TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 113)

cases.generated_sql:
WITH ps AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
),
pis AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_improvement_summary.parquet')
)
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number,
  ps.land_use,
  ps.assessed_value,
  ps.acres,
  ps.assessor_year_built AS year_built,
  pis.total_garage_area
FROM ps
JOIN pis ON ps.parcel_number = pis.parcel_number
WHERE
  (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 119
  AND ps.assessor_year_built < 1985
  AND pis.total_garage_area > 0
  AND (ps.years_since_last_valid_sale IS NULL OR ps.years_since_last_valid_sale >= 20)

cases.prompt: Private bare recreation lots with valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.has_geometry,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS land_use_code,
    COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND ps.acres > 0
    AND improvement_building_count = 0
),
excluded_codes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT code FROM (VALUES
    (140), -- Condos residential
    (970), -- Condo moorage
    (710), (711), (712), (713), (714), (715), (716), (717), (718), (719), (720), (721), (722), (723), (724), (725), (726), (727), (728), (729), (730), (731), (732), (733), (734), (735), (736), (737), (738), (739), (740), (741), (742), (743), (744), (745), (746), (747), (748), (749), (750), (751), (752), (753), (754), (755), (756), (757), (758), (759), (760), (761), (762), (763), (764), (765), (766), (767), (768), (769), (770), (771), (772), (773), (774), (775), (776), (777), (778), (779), (780), (781), (782), (783), (784), (785), (786), (787), (788), (789), (790),
    (911), -- Unimproved land inside city
    (180), -- Mobile homes
    (181), -- MH leased property
    (190), -- Vacation and cabin
    (941)  -- Farm & ag conservation
  )
) 
SELECT
  base.parcel_number,
  base.land_use,
  base.acres
FROM base
WHERE base.land_use_code NOT IN (140, 970, 180, 181, 190, 941) -- exclude condos, moorage, MH, vacation, farm conservation
  AND base.land_use_code BETWEEN 710 AND 790 -- cultural/recreation range
  AND base.land_use_code NOT IN (911) -- exclude unimproved land inside city
  AND base.improvement_building_count = 0
  AND base.has_geometry = TRUE
ORDER BY base.acres DESC

cases.prompt: Low quality single family residential parcels countywide with condition evidence included.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number,
    string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes,
    string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.condition_cd), ' | ') AS condition_codes
  FROM
    read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE
    TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY
    parcel_number
)
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number,
  ps.land_use,
  ps.assessed_value,
  ps.acres,
  ps.improvement_building_count,
  lqi.quality_codes,
  lqi.condition_codes,
  'MSL low-quality improvement class with condition codes' AS match_reasons
FROM
  read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  JOIN low_quality_improvements AS lqi ON ps.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
WHERE
  TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111)
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
ORDER BY
  ps.parcel_number

cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.primary_actual_year_built, ps.primary_building_improvement_value, ps.improvement_building_count, 
    string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
  LEFT JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
    ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
  WHERE 
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 113
  GROUP BY ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.primary_actual_year_built, ps.primary_building_improvement_value, ps.improvement_building_count
), filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE quality_codes NOT LIKE '%MSL%'
)
SELECT parcel_number, land_use, acres, assessed_value, primary_actual_year_built, primary_building_improvement_value, improvement_building_count, quality_codes
FROM filtered
ORDER BY parcel_number

cases.prompt: Fair quality single family homes in Skagit County, excluding average and low quality.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH fair_quality_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value,
    ps.improvement_building_count,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
    ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
  WHERE
    -- Single family residential land use codes (DOR codes 110-140 range)
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(REGEXP_EXTRACT(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113, 120, 130, 140)
    AND ps.improvement_building_count > 0
    AND TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSF'
  GROUP BY ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.improvement_building_count
),
excluded_parcels AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet')
  WHERE TRIM(imprv_det_class_cd) IN ('MSL', 'MSA')
)
SELECT
  fqp.parcel_number,
  fqp.land_use,
  fqp.acres,
  fqp.assessed_value,
  fqp.improvement_building_count,
  fqp.quality_codes,
  'MSF fair quality improvements only, excluding MSA and MSL' AS match_reasons
FROM fair_quality_parcels fqp
LEFT JOIN excluded_parcels ep ON fqp.parcel_number = ep.parcel_number
WHERE ep.parcel_number IS NULL
ORDER BY fqp.parcel_number
cases.title: Fair Quality Single Family Homes in Skagit County Excluding Average and Low Quality
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels with single family residential land use codes, having improvements classified as fair quality (MSF) but excluding average (MSA) and low (MSL) quality classes. Countywide Skagit search with no city limits filter.

WHERE
  (
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 510 AND 590
    OR TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 610 AND 691
  )
  AND ps.valid_sale_count > 0
  AND ps.sold_last_5_years = TRUE
cases.title: Commercial Retail or Service Parcels with Valid Sale in Last 5 Years
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with land use indicating commercial retail or service use and having a valid sale recorded in the last 5 years
